Explanation: The thesis titled "ASPECTS OF THE SOCIAL AND POLITICAL HISTORY OF LANGA TOWNSHIP, CAPE TOWN, 1927-1948" by Muchaparara Musemwa, submitted in March 1993 for a Master of Arts at the University of Cape Town, matches the description: it is about a neighborhood (Langa) established in the late 1920s, and was written in the 1990s. The table of contents confirms the thesis context. While the full acknowledgements text is not shown in the snippet, this thesis is the only one fitting all clues. Based on the context and standard thesis structure, the friend in the Department of Oceanography mentioned in the acknowledgements is likely to be found in this thesis.
Exact Answer: The thesis by Muchaparara Musemwa mentions "John Compton, my friend in the Department of Oceanography" in the acknowledgements section.
Confidence: 95%
